evidence_summary: Establish the overwhelming psychological dominance of The Wizard through massive, intimidating illusions within a vast architectural space. Use scale disparity between the small travelers and the colossal Head/Beast to drive terror before transitioning into...

The travelers are brought into the Throne Room. They are met with terrifying, massive illusions (the Head, the Beast) designed to intimidate them. The Lion's roar inadvertently triggers a reveal or breaks the tension.
Travelers enter the vast, dark expanse of the throne room.
Tension breaks into shock following a roar.
The travelers face intimidating illusions until a roar triggers a reveal.
